LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S HEARING FOR DETERMINATION OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE COURT GRANTS THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND ORDERS THE LEVYING OFFICER TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE COURT SIGNS A FORMAL ORDER WHICH IT SHALL MAIL TO THE PARTIES AND TO THE SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Judgment Debtor JOSE SEVILLA (Tel: 415-716-4642) present in pro per and is assisted by certified Spanish-language court interpreter DANIEL NAVARRO;
No appearance made by or for Judgment Creditor LVNV Funding LLC.

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S HEARING FOR DETERMINATION OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear at today's hearing.

The Court grants the judgment debtor's claim of exemption and orders the levying officer to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor.

The Court recommends the judgment debtor contact the judgment creditor to work out a payment plan in the hopes of avoiding a future hearing like today's.

The Court signs a formal order which it shall mail to the parties and to the San Francisco County Sheriff's Office.

JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jose Sevilla Hernandez 415-716-4642 Defendant in pro Per accompanied by his daughter.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant informs the Court ha cannot pay. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =302/HK

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JOSE SEVILLA, TEL. NO. 724-2119, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - DEFENDANT JOSE SEVILLA'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. Claimant has demonstrated that the garnished wages are necessary for the support of himself, spouse and minor children. The levying officer is directed to release any money held ot the judgment creditor. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
